beats.what: A dark, wet street at night with streetlights reflecting on the pavement.
Streetlights cast yellow glows on the wet road surface in the darkness.
Green and red lights from distant traffic reflect on the damp road.
The camera moves forward along a dark, illuminated street at night.
Blurred lights and reflections shimmer on the wet asphalt in the dark.

formal.text: A dark, wet street sits under nocturnal illumination.
Yellow streetlights reflect upon the damp pavement.
Green and red traffic lights appear in the reflections.
The camera progresses along the illuminated road.
Blurred lights shimmer on the wet asphalt.

sarcastic.text: Ah, the glamorous nightlife of a damp parking lot.
Truly, the yellow glow is breathtaking.
Red and green lights. Riveting stuff.
Another stunning puddle. I am overwhelmed.

humorous_tech.text: Local environment is looking a bit buggy tonight.
High latency in the lighting engine detected.
Red and green status lights showing deployment errors.
Still waiting for the assets to finish loading.
Rendering error: too many reflections in the buffer.

humorous_non_tech.text: Someone definitely forgot to dry the sidewalk.
The streetlights are feeling very dramatic tonight.
Even the puddles are showing off their colors.
Just walking through a giant glow-in-the-dark puddle.
It is basically a disco for cars.
